title: 30 Unexplained Stuff Speculation
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS] 3.0 Unexplained Stuff Speculation             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Nov 17, 2012 5:48 pm This thread is not for posting any wild speculations that come to your mind. As we know, the 3.0 looks to be devastatingly detail-packed. We're waiting on elaboration for many things, but already we can perhaps deduce that some of the elements will not be addressed in this film, if at all. This thread is for posting speculations about such details. I will start things off by selecting a weird, inexplicable visual detail from the film (that I haven't yet seen for myself) and providing a possible explanation for it. Ornette via Reichu wrote: At the Third Impact site, "there's like these red Evas everywhere, looks almost as if they're made from core material. You can see armor, they're like stone statues, except not made of stone, but this red stuff."

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Sat Nov 17, 2012 5:52 pm I probably already know the answer to this, but I'm assuming we got no information on Unit 07, or 10-12 did we?

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Sat Nov 17, 2012 5:53 pm We probably wont get an answer to, What exactly happened to Kaji?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Nov 17, 2012 5:53 pm TheFriskyIan wrote: I probably already know the answer to this, but I'm assuming we got no information on Unit 08, or 10-12 did we?

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Sat Nov 17, 2012 5:55 pm Reichu wrote: Eva-08 is Mari's. 07 and 10-12 are missing numbers. Guess away!

[]:             Quote Post by penguintruth » Sat Nov 17, 2012 9:10 pm What of my beloved Pen Pen? Destroyed in Third Impact?

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Sat Nov 17, 2012 9:14 pm http://www.pinguins.info/Engels/Lifespan_eng.html "The average lifespan of penguins is probably 15 to 20 years." He led a good life. Remember him this way

[]:             Quote Post by balofo » Sat Nov 17, 2012 9:15 pm -Is Rei II's soul still inside EVA-01? -Why was EVA-01 coffin in space? -Any mention of Nebuchadnezzar Key? -Are Seele members really dead after the timeskip? -What was the point of Mark 06? -WHAT THE HELL IS GENDO'S PLAN THIS TIME?

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sat Nov 17, 2012 9:16 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by Kaname Langley » Sat Nov 17, 2012 9:19 pm Eva 02 and Code 777?

[]:             Quote Post by penguintruth » Sat Nov 17, 2012 9:25 pm Jayfive wrote: http://www.pinguins.info/Engels/Lifespan_eng.html "The average lifespan of penguins is probably 15 to 20 years." He led a good life. Remember him this way

[]:             Quote Post by LordEvan88 » Sat Nov 17, 2012 9:29 pm What the heck is anyone doing? Seriously. What is SEELE's master plan? What is Gendo's? Why did they have to wait years to enact these plans? Did they really go 14 years between Angel attacks? None of the characters seem to have a clear endgame. What is the deal with Mari? She came across as this really intriguing character who was unusually informed and had questionable loyalties, now it just seems like shes one of the gang for no clear reason. I'm sure some of this will be answered once I actually get to see the film, and I'm sure a lot has been lost in translation, but the 14 year time skip has really made things way more complicated than they needed to be, especially since they decided to not age most of the core cast. A year would have been just as good, really. Enough for things to go to shit but not so long that you have to wonder why nothing has happened for so long.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Sat Nov 17, 2012 10:03 pm ...

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Sat Nov 17, 2012 11:25 pm LordEvan88 wrote: What the heck is anyone doing? Seriously. What is SEELE's master plan? What is Gendo's? Why did they have to wait years to enact these plans? Did they really go 14 years between Angel attacks? None of the characters seem to have a clear endgame.

[]:             Quote Post by Ynnead » Sat Nov 17, 2012 11:32 pm Pretty much everything about Mari is unexplained and open for speculation.

[]:             Quote Post by LordEvan88 » Sun Nov 18, 2012 2:04 am Chuckman wrote: Whenever Gendo hangs up, Kihl and co. listen to Styx and play Call of Duty games.

[]:             Quote Post by Rawinder » Mon Nov 19, 2012 3:36 pm What is the 12th Angel? The only instance it's popped up in any of the spoilers is to say that it was destroyed by the Wunder Also, why are some Evas designed "Unit-xx" and others "Mark.xx"? Is there a (known) difference?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Nov 19, 2012 3:48 pm Rawinder wrote: What is the 12th Angel?

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Tue Nov 20, 2012 1:23 am Seele00TextOnly wrote: I have a suspicion about Mari and Kaji. I think this Wille organization was in the works for a while now, and they were members long before everything went to shit. But who knows.

[]:             Quote Post by Grub » Tue Nov 20, 2012 2:26 am Ynnead wrote: Pretty much everything about Mari is unexplained and open for speculation.
